title: Doff Organic Pelleted Chicken Manure Fertiliser, Orange
features: VERSATILE PLANT FOOD – Boost the health of flowers, vegetables, and lawns with Doff Chicken Manure Multipurpose Fertiliser. Enriched with NPK 4-2.5-2.3 and micro-nutrients, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants in outdoor gardens and indoor houseplants

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this plant feed strengthens roots, stimulates flowering, and improves overall plant health. Scatter 2-3 handfuls of the slow-release garden fertiliser pellets to the base of the plant or lawn and water

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This all-purpose garden and lawn feed is supplied as a ready-to-use pellet blend for quick and effective application. Whether nurturing hanging baskets or expansive gardens, Doff’s plant food saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality dry flower feed provides consistent, balanced nutrition for thriving plants year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, a 2.25kg container of nutrient-rich feed supports healthy, flourishing growth in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Handle with care. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not use in enclosed spaces. Use gloves and protective clothing when handling. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. In case of accidental contact, rinse thoroughly with water. If swallowed, seek medical advice immediately. Do not apply in windy conditions to avoid drift. Do not apply to plants intended for human or animal consumption.
